es.title: Elevación lateral (polea)
es.overview: Movimiento de elevación del hombro enfocado en deltoides.
instructions: Ubicate en polea con el torso firme.
Tomá el implemento con agarre pronado medio.
Elevá los brazos siguiendo el plano del movimiento indicado.
Descendé con control sin usar impulso.
tips: Usá una carga que te permita mover sin impulso.
Mantené el cuello relajado durante la elevación.
benefits: Ayuda a desarrollar los deltoides y el control del hombro.

en.title: Lateral Raise (Cable)
en.description: Exercise primarily focused on the shoulders.
en.overview: Shoulder elevation movement focused on the deltoids.
instructions: Set up on the cable station with a stable torso.
Take the implement with a medium pronated grip.
Raise the arms through the intended movement plane.
Lower under control without using momentum.
tips: Use a load you can lift without momentum.
Keep the neck relaxed during the raise.
common_mistakes: Shrugging the traps during the raise
benefits: Helps develop the deltoids and shoulder control.
